company_description: Cybersecurity platform focused on asset visibility, device intelligence, and policy-based control.

default_audience_messages.Executive: Focus on business value, risk reduction, operational efficiency, and strategic impact.
default_audience_messages.Security: Focus on visibility, control, compliance, and reduced risk exposure.
default_audience_messages.Operations: Focus on operational efficiency, automation, and faster issue response.

product_capabilities.name: Asset Discovery
product_capabilities.description: Continuously discovers and classifies connected devices across the environment.
business_values: reduces security risk from unknown assets

sample_stakeholder_messages.Executive: Improves visibility across the environment and reduces risk associated with unmanaged assets.
sample_stakeholder_messages.Security: Provides continuous discovery and classification of connected devices to reduce blind spots.
sample_stakeholder_messages.Operations: Helps maintain a more accurate inventory and respond faster to device-related issues.

product_capabilities.name: Policy-Based Control
product_capabilities.description: Applies policy-based enforcement to manage device access and compliance.
business_values: supports risk reduction across the environment

sample_stakeholder_messages.Executive: Strengthens the organization’s ability to enforce security controls consistently across connected assets.
sample_stakeholder_messages.Security: Supports automated enforcement for devices that violate policy or present elevated risk.
sample_stakeholder_messages.Operations: Reduces manual effort required to identify and respond to non-compliant devices.
